title: EasyPlaceFix
description:
Fixed easy placement orientation issue
(修复了轻松放置朝向问题)
body:
This is a client-side fabric mod for [Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica) that needs to be used with the original projection (Litematica need).
- Make it easy to place cubes placed in multiplayer games with the correct orientation
+ Switch to SLAB_ONLY protocol when using in multiplayer games.





这是客户端fabric mod,是对[Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica)的修改,需要与原版投影一起使用(Litematica need)。
- 使轻松放置在多人游戏中放置的方块有正确的朝向
+ 在多人游戏中使用时请切换到SLAB_ONLY协议
